## Definition of Done Checklist

- [ ] All unit tests pass (`npm run test:unit`)
- [ ] All E2E tests pass for affected journeys (`npm run test:e2e`)
- [ ] Test performance budgets met (unit <3s, E2E <60s)
- [ ] Zero `any` types — TypeScript strict mode clean (`npm run type-check`)
- [ ] ESLint clean (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] All external data validated with Zod schemas
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in diff
- [ ] No `eval()`, `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`, or unsafe patterns
- [ ] Agent ownership boundaries respected
- [ ] New API endpoints have JSDoc
